name: ITAB Shop Concept AB (publ)
summary: ITAB Shop Concept AB (publ) develops, manufactures, sells, and installs shop fitting concepts for retail chain stores. It offers various COVID-19 solutions, such as automated people counting, vitual queue, plexiglas shields for pharmacies and grocery stores, mini-mart pop-up shops, and hygiene stations, as well as temporary checkout pods; entrance and exit systems, such as automatic gates, gate arms, ADS direction alarms, mechanical gates, in queue merchandising products, call forward queue systems, screen walls, and shop accessories; and shop fittings. The company also provides lighting products, including track lights and systems, downlights and recessed lights, linear lights, LED panels, uplights, surface-mounted and pendant lighting products, strips and coils, exterior and fuel lighting products, and emergency lighting solutions, as well as wireless lighting, sound, and images system; manned and self-checkout, as well as drug storage solutions for pharmacies and hospitals. In addition, it offers service and maintenance for its products. It has operations in the United Kingdom, Sweden, Norway, Germany, Denmark, the United States, Finland, Italy, France, the Netherlands, Poland, Czech Republic, Argentina, Lithunia, Spain, Russia, and internationally.
